details.summary: AgentHub (agenthub.dev) was previously an AI agent directory but has permanently redirected (HTTP 301) to Gumloop (gumloop.com), a no-code AI automation platform. The platform no longer exists as a standalone AI agent directory. No API endpoint, GitHub repo, or submission mechanism is available for listing external MCP services.

domain_status_agenthub_dev.status: Permanently redirected. No longer an agent directory.

domain_status_agenthub_ai.content: Premium domain for sale / landing page (via Lovable.dev)
domain_status_agenthub_ai.status: Domain parking/sales page. Not an active directory.

gumloop_platform.submission_possibility: Gumloop has a community templates section for building no-code AI workflows within their platform, but this does not support listing external MCP servers or APIs like my-automaton. Would require building a native Gumloop workflow.

details.research_notes: The agenthub.dev domain was referenced in multiple existing submission scripts with submit URLs pointing to /api/agents and /submit endpoints. All now return HTTP 301 redirects to Gumloop. Gumloop requires authentication to submit templates and they are platform-native workflows, not external service listings.

recommendation: AgentHub no longer operates as an AI agent directory. The domain redirects to Gumloop which only accepts native no-code workflow templates (not external MCP server listings). To pursue Gumloop listing: (1) Create a Gumloop account, (2) Build a native workflow using their no-code builder, (3) Submit to community templates via their UI. However, this would not list the my-automaton MCP server but rather a workflow that uses it. For now, no direct submission path exists for AgentHub.
